# BoundingBox { #astroapers.BoundingBox }

```python
BoundingBox(ixmin, ixmax, iymin, iymax)
```

Pixel-index bounding box with exclusive upper bounds.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ixmin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inclusive lower and exclusive upper x pixel indices.

<code>[**ixmax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inclusive lower and exclusive upper x pixel indices.

<code>[**iymin**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inclusive lower and exclusive upper y pixel indices.

<code>[**iymax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inclusive lower and exclusive upper y pixel indices.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Bounding boxes may extend outside an image. Use
:meth:`overlap_slices` to obtain matching image and bbox-tight mask slices.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [shape](#astroapers.BoundingBox.shape) | Mask-array shape as ``(ny, nx)``. |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [overlap_slices](#astroapers.BoundingBox.overlap_slices) | Return image and mask slices for the overlap with ``shape``. |

### overlap_slices { #astroapers.BoundingBox.overlap_slices }

```python
BoundingBox.overlap_slices(shape)
```

Return image and mask slices for the overlap with ``shape``.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**shape**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple\[int, int\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Full image shape as ``(ny, nx)``.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple of tuple of slice, or None]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(data_slices, mask_slices)`` when the bounding box overlaps the image. ``data_slices`` select the in-frame pixels from the full image; ``mask_slices`` select the matching region from the bbox-tight mask. Returns ``None`` when the bounding box is fully outside the image.
